name: Women Helpline (All India)
notes: 24x7 toll-free helpline for women in distress, run by the Ministry of Women and Child Development. Connects to police, hospitals, legal aid, and protection officers.

name: Emergency Response Support System
notes: India's unified emergency number covering police, fire, and ambulance, available 24x7.

name: Police
notes: Direct police helpline, also reachable via 112.

name: Ambulance / Disaster Management
notes: Free emergency ambulance service in most states.

name: Cyber Crime Helpline
notes: 24x7 national helpline run by the Ministry of Home Affairs for reporting cybercrime and financial fraud. Also file complaints at cybercrime.gov.in.

name: Childline (for minors)
notes: 24x7 helpline for children in need of aid or protection.

name: National Commission for Women — 24x7 helpline
notes: For complaints of domestic violence, sexual violence, and harassment.

name: National Commission for Women — office
notes: General office line; complaints can also be filed online at ncw.nic.in.

name: Nearest police station women's help desk
notes: Most police stations in India now have a dedicated women's help desk — ask for it by name when you arrive or call ahead via 100.

name: Sakhi One Stop Centres
notes: Government-run centres present in most districts, offering medical, legal, police, and counselling support under one roof for women affected by violence. Reachable via the 181 helpline.
